# CWE-798: Use of Hard-coded Credentials (mitigated, pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-798-safe.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"
	"os"
)

// Safe: credentials are loaded from environment at runtime.
func ConnectReporting(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	dsn := os.Getenv("REPORTING_DSN")
	db, err := sql.Open("postgres", dsn)
	if err != nil {
		http.Error(w, "connection failed", http.StatusInternalServerError)
		return
	}
	defer db.Close()
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
	_, _ = w.Write([]byte(`{"connected":true}`))
}
